challenges_english: I felt that my vision was worse with the glasses. They also caused eye fatigue in the evenings. I took off the glasses and rested my eyes at times. They were also heavy and chafed on the bridge of my nose so that it started to bleed at one point. I wore a bandage and sometimes supported the glasses with my hand so they wouldn't rest on my nose or under my eyes.
act_impact_english: In the evenings, I found that they disrupted my vision. The glasses made me feel insecure during certain physical activities for fear of dropping them. Outside and in the store, many people stared but no one said anything.
beh_adapt_english: I avoided going through a park at night because I was afraid those I met would think I was filming them and that this could lead to a confrontation. I skipped a work meeting.
social_english: At the workplace and in online meetings. Most people first thought I was wearing a camera so I often had to explain what I was wearing. I wore the glasses at a leisure activity in the evening where I received comments.
improvements_english: I would have preferred to have the glasses without lenses. If you could make a solution with an optical fiber close to the eyes instead and have the meter itself somewhere else, that would be very valuable. I experienced no problems at all with the necklace or arm sensor but I doubt the arm sensor gives such good values. You often had to remind yourself not to cover it with your sleeve, jacket or gloves.
challenges: Jag upplevde att jag såg sämre med glasögonen. De ledde också till ögontrötthet på kvällarna. Tog av glasögonen och vilade ögonen vid några tillfällen. De var också tunga och skavde på näsryggen så den började blöda vid ett tillfälle. Jag bar plåster och stöttade ibland upp glasögonen med handen så att de inte skulle vila på näsa eller under ögonen.
act_impact: På kvällarna tyckte jag att de störde min syn.  Glasögonen gjorde att jag kände osäkerhet i vissa fysiska aktiviteter av rädsla för att tappa glasögonen.   Utomhus och i affären var det många som stirrade men ingen sade något.
beh_adapt: Jag undvek att gå genom en park kvällstid eftersom jag var rädd att de jag mötte skulle tro att jag filmade dem och att detta kunde leda till en konfrontation.   Jag avstod ett möte på jobbet.
social: På arbetsplatsen och i online-möten. De flesta trodde först att jag bar en kamera så fick förklara ofta vad jag bar. Bar glasögonen på en fritidsaktivitet kvällstid där jag fick kommentarer.
improvements: Jag hade föredragit att ha glasögonen utan glas. Om man kunde göra en lösning med en optisk fiber nära ögonen i stället och ha själva mätaren någon annanstans hade det varit mycket värt. Jag upplevde inga besvär alls med halsbandet eller armsensorn men tvivlar på att armsensorn ger så bra värden. Man fick ofta påminna sig om att inte täcka över den med tröjärm, jacka eller vantar.

challenges_english: The glasses got dirty, and there was soreness on my ears.  I endured the pain.
social_english: Someone asked, somewhat aggressively, why I was filming because the person thought the light-logging sensor was a camera.
improvements_english: Include a way to clean the glasses.
challenges: Glassögonen blev smutsiga, och öronskav.   Härdade ut smärtan
social: Någon frågade lite halvt aggressivt om varför jag filmade för personen trodde ljusloggande sensorn var en kamera
improvements: Ge med sätt att tvätta glassögonen

challenges_english: When I was lying in bed and the glasses pressed against my head. I adjusted the glasses.
act_impact_english: While soldering at work, the lenses got dirty and I had to clean them often.
social_english: Yes, people asked if I was recording/filming.
improvements_english: Glasses without lenses. More comfortable for the eyes and can't get dirty.
challenges: När jag låg i sängen och glasögonen tryckte mot huvudet. Justerade glasögonen.
act_impact: Under lödning på jobbet, smutsiga glas, fick tvätta ofta.
social: Ja, folk frågade om jag filmade.
improvements: Glasögon utan glas. Mer vant för ögon och kan inte bli smutsiga.

general_feeling_english: I'm not used to wearing glasses, so it felt somewhat unusual and sometimes impractical (in cloudy/drizzly weather).
challenges_english: A bit of chafing around the ears. Lots of curious looks when moving around in public.
beh_adapt_english: No, I tried to follow my normal routines.
social_english: Many, especially in shops when interacting with cashiers, and also when meeting acquaintances.
improvements_english: The bracelet was difficult not to cover with a sweater/jacket. Having it as a "wrist wrap" would have been better since you could wear it over clothing.
general_feeling: Jag är ovan vid att bära glasögon och tyckte var en smula ovanligt och ibland opraktiskt (vid mulet/duggregn)
challenges: Lite skav kring öronen. Många nyfikna blickar då man rörde sig i offentligheten
act_impact: Vid skärmtittande/när man rör sig utomhus
beh_adapt: Nej, jag försökte följa mina normala rutiner
social: många, speciellt i affärer när man hade kontakt med kassör, oc även om man träffade bekanta
improvements: Armbandet var svårt att inte täcka över med tröja/jacka. Att ha den som en "wrist wrap" hade varit bättre då man kan sätta den utanpå ett plagg

general_feeling_english: A bit uncomfortable towards the evening as they became a little uncomfortable on the nose and around the head.
challenges_english: It didn't feel good to walk around the grocery store since many people thought it was a camera. I didn't take them in with me.
beh_adapt_english: Nothing I can think of now.
social_english: Some people asked what I was wearing and why.
improvements_english: The necklace might be enough. It's not as attention-grabbing. Doesn't disturb the user as much.
general_feeling: Lite obehagligt framåt kvällen då de var lite obekväma på näsan och runt huvudet.
challenges: Känns inte så bra att gå omkring i mataffären då många tror att det är en kamera. Tog inte med dem in.
act_impact: När man ska träffa andra människor
social: Några frågade vad det var man hade på sig och varför
improvements: Kan räcka med halsbandet. Inte lika uppseendeväckande. Stör inte lika mycket för användaren.

general_feeling_english: It felt OK for the most part.
challenges_english: A bit uncomfortable the first day, then it was ok.
act_impact_english: At home while playing with my son. He tries to touch the sensors.
social_english: I take the bus to work so people sometimes stared. However, no one said anything.
improvements_english: It would be good if they could be smaller/concealed, of course.
general_feeling: Det kändes OK för det mesta
challenges: Lite obekvämt första dagen, sen var det ok
act_impact: Hemma när jag lekte med sonen. Han försöker ta på sensorerna
social: Åker buss till jobbet så folk stirrade ibland. Ingen som sade något dock.
improvements: Bra om de kunde vara mindre/dolda så klart.

general_feeling_english: Relatively strenuous because of the glasses. They were not particularly comfortable, and I didn't feel completely at ease among people.
challenges_english: See response to previous question. In some cases, I took the glasses off for short periods when there were a lot of people around (in stores and similar situations), and also to relieve the pressure on my nose.
beh_adapt_english: No, not really. I played two rounds of golf and normally wear sunglasses during that, which was not possible this time.
social_english: I usually explained when it involved friends and acquaintances. Otherwise, there were no comments from strangers.
improvements_english: The sensors worn around the neck and wrist were no problem at all. The glasses with the sensors were relatively burdensome, both physically (uncomfortable and front-heavy) and, in some situations, mentally as well.
general_feeling: Relativt ansträngande för glasögonen. Dels satt de inte speciellt skönt och dels kände jag mig inte helt bekväm bland folk.
challenges: Se svar föregående fråga. I några fall tog jag av mig glasögonen korta stunder bland mycket folk (affärer och liknande), och även för att avlasta näsan.
beh_adapt: Nej, egentligen inte. Spelade 2 rundor golf och brukar då ha solglasögon vilket inte gick nu.
social: Jag förklarade oftast om när det handlade om vänner och bekanta. I övrigt inga kommentarer från okända.
improvements: De sensorerna som bars runt halsen och handleden var inga problem alls. Glasögonen med sensorerna var relativt påfrestande, både fysiskt (obekväma och framtunga) och i vissa situationer även till viss del mentalt.

challenges_english: In certain situations, it was bothersome, which made me take off the glasses.
beh_adapt_english: Either explain why I was wearing them or take the glasses off.
social_english: Yes, mostly curiosity. But also people asked if I was filming (like a GoPro camera).
improvements_english: Sensors on the wrist and around the neck are completely fine. The sensor on the glasses could hopefully be made smaller to attract less attention.
challenges: Vissa situationer var det besvärande vilket medförde att jag tog av mig glasögonen.
beh_adapt: Antingen berätta om varför jag bar dem eller ta av glasögonen.
social: Ja, nyfikenhet för det mesta. Men också fråga om jag filmade (GoPro-kamera).
improvements: Sensorer på handled och runt hals helt ok. Glasögonens sensor kunde förhoppningsvis göras mindre för minskad uppmärksamhet.

general_feeling_english: The glasses were uncomfortable and attracted the attention of people around me. I would have preferred them to be more discreet.
challenges_english: They pressed on my nose and I often felt that my vision was worse with the glasses on, especially in the evening.
act_impact_english: Among people in public places and in the evening when you are tired.
social_english: Yes, they attracted interest. Many of those who commented were curious; others thought I had a camera.
improvements_english: The glasses were uncomfortable, but unfortunately I have no solution for how to keep the sensor close to the eyes otherwise.
general_feeling: Glasögonen var obekväma och väckte omgivningens uppmärksamhet. Hade önskat de var mer diskreta.
challenges: De tryckte på näsan och jag upplevde ofta att jag såg sämre med glasögonen på. Särskilt på kvällen.
act_impact: Bland folk på allmän plats och på kvällen när man är trött.
social: Ja, de väckte intresse. Många som kommenterade var intresserade, andra trodde att man hade en kamera.
improvements: Glasögonen var obekväma men har tyvärr ingen lösning på hur man skall ha sensorn nära ögonen annars.

general_feeling_english: They got many strange looks. Most people thought it was a GoPro or similar. One person thought I had been in an accident.
challenges_english: They did not fit properly and kept falling off. I had to tape them to my face which was very irritating. And my toddler would often grab at them. At times when I was not able to tape them to my face, I had to wear a cap and rest the glasses on the peak (this was mainly at the weekend). But in this situation I felt I did not have free movement of my head.
act_impact_english: When I had to look after my toddler, e.g. bending over, playing, etc.
beh_adapt_english: Not really. The first day I cycled with them I went to work later than usual, so there would be less other traffic, while I got used to the glasses.
social_english: Every time I met someone in person they asked about the devices. By the end of the week it got a bit boring to explain it each time.
improvements_english: Glasses that are somehow adjustable so that they are a better fit. Or with different sizes and shapes of glasses to choose from, so that the best fit can be selected.

At times when I was not able to tape them to my face, I had to wear a cap and rest the glasses on the peak (this was mainly at the weekend). challenges_english: I got headache especially during the last days. People kept asking what that was and it was annoying. They were heavy and people thought I was recording them which was a bit uncomfortable.
beh_adapt_english: Yes I had to adapt by changing my training and sleeping routine. I also had to make some decisions not to go into some places as people would think I am recording them.
improvements_english: Make it as small as possible and very light in weight.

beh_adapt: Yes I had to adapt by changing my training and sleeping routine. I also had to make some decisions not to go into some places as people would think I am recording them

general_feeling_english: The glasses were a slight obstacle when you normally wear glasses.
social_english: Yes, a lot of questions to answer.
improvements_english: The sensor for the glasses could be attached to regular glasses.
general_feeling: glasögonen var ett litet hinder när man har glasögon i vanliga fall
improvements: Sensorn till glasögonen skulle kunna sättas på vanliga glasögonen.

general_feeling_english: It felt a bit complicated at times, especially having to think about keeping the sensors visible at all times. The glasses also made people react strangely, which felt disturbing.
challenges_english: Wearing the sensors around my neck and on my wrist was sometimes challenging, as I often caught myself with them being covered by clothes or other objects, making it difficult to ensure proper data collection. The glasses felt bulky and often drew attention in social settings. Many people thought they were camera glasses, which led to people around me reacting strangely or feeling uncomfortable, something I also found disturbing. My children were obsessed with the glasses and wanted to have them themselves, which was both bothersome and challenging.
act_impact_english: Above all, in social situations, such as meetings or conversations with colleagues or strangers, because the glasses attracted a lot of attention. I also became more aware of how I moved and how clothes or hair could cover the sensors.
beh_adapt_english: Yes, I tried to avoid wearing scarves or long-sleeved clothing that could cover the sensors. I also sometimes adapted my social interactions; for example, I would take off the glasses before certain meetings to avoid misunderstandings or uncomfortable reactions.
social_english: Yes, several times. Many people thought the glasses had a camera and asked if I was filming. This caused some worry or discomfort in others, which affected both my and their behavior.
improvements_english: Using the glasses was quite troublesome as they gave off a lot of light reflections and needed cleaning, etc. Also, when it was very sunny, I wished I could wear sunglasses instead. If the glasses are the best design, maybe clip-on sunglasses are needed? I would have rather worn a cap with a sensor in it, which would have felt more discreet in some way and wouldn't have been so much 'in the way'.
general_feeling: Det kändes lite krångligt ibland, särskilt att tänka på att sensorerna skulle vara synliga hela tiden. Glasögonen gjorde också att folk reagerade märkligt, vilket kändes störande.
challenges: Att bära sensorerna runt halsen och på handleden var ibland utmanande, eftersom jag ofta kom på mig själv med att de kunde vara täckta av kläder eller andra föremål, vilket gjorde det svårt att säkerställa korrekt datainsamling. Glasögonen upplevdes som skrymmande och väckte ofta uppmärksamhet i sociala sammanhang. Många trodde att det rörde sig om kameraglasögon, vilket ledde till att människor i omgivningen reagerade märkligt eller blev obekväma,  något som jag själv också upplevde som störande. Mina barn var besatt av glasögonen och ville ha dem själva, vilket var både jobbigt och utmanande.
act_impact: Framför allt i sociala sammanhang, till exempel möten eller samtal med kollegor eller främlingar, eftersom glasögonen drog till sig mycket uppmärksamhet. Jag blev också mer medveten om hur jag rörde mig och hur kläder eller hår kunde täcka sensorerna.
beh_adapt: Ja, jag försökte undvika att ha halsdukar eller långärmade plagg som kunde täcka sensorerna. Jag anpassade också ibland mina sociala interaktioner, exempelvis tog jag av mig glasögonen inför vissa möten för att undvika missförstånd eller obekväma reaktioner.
social: Ja, flera gånger. Många trodde att glasögonen hade en kamera och frågade om jag filmade. Det väckte viss oro eller obehag hos andra, vilket påverkade både mitt och deras beteende.
improvements: Det var rätt besvärligt att använda glasögonen då de gav mycket ljusreflekter och behövde putsas etc. Sedan väldigt soligt och kanske önskan om att ha solglasögon istället. Om glasögonen är bästa designen kanske "clip-on" solglasögon behövs?    Jag hade hellre burit en keps med en sensor i, hade känts mer diskret på något sätt och inte varit så mycket "i vägten".

general_feeling_english: It felt okay. It became natural after a while.
challenges_english: It felt a bit strange to wear them at the gym, but that feeling passed quickly. Otherwise, nothing.
beh_adapt_english: No, I don't think so. It was more thoughts about how it was perceived, but I didn't change my behavior.
improvements_english: Apart from something happening with the light logger on the wristband, where the battery seems to have run out, they were good and minimalist, and it's good that you can't accidentally turn off the logging. I have no suggestions for improvements.
general_feeling: Det kändes okej. Det blev naturligt efter ett tag.
challenges: Kändes lite märkligt att bära på gym men det gick över fort, annars inget.
beh_adapt: Nej, det tycker jag inte. Det var mer tankar om hur det uppfattades men jag ändrade inget beteende.
improvements: Förutom att något hände med ljusloggern på armbandet där batteriet verkar ha tagit slut så var de bra och minimalistiska, och bra att man inte av misstag kan stänga av loggning. Har inga förbättringsförslag.

general_feeling_english: Except for the glasses. Felt okay but there were too many questionnaires.
challenges_english: Loosened the straps if it chafed.
act_impact_english: During the workday. It was difficult to make sure they were not blocked.
beh_adapt_english: Yes, short-sleeved shirt, either open or closed jacket. Otherwise, the logger around the neck could be hidden.
social_english: Only from colleagues who already knew about the experiment.
improvements_english: The head-mounted logger should be able to be worn in several ways depending on the subject's preference and the season. A hat or headband could have been a good alternative.
general_feeling: bar ej glasögon. kändes okej men var för mycket enkäter.
challenges: lossade på spännen om det skavde.
act_impact: under arbetsdagen. var svårt att säkerställa att de inte var blockerade.
beh_adapt: ja, kortarmad tröja  antingen öppen eller stängd jacka. annars kunde loggen runt halsen gömmas.
social: Bara från kollegor som redan kände till experimentet.
improvements: huvudburen logger borde kunna bäras på flera sätt utifrån testpersons preferens och årstid. en mössa eller pannband hade kunnat vara ett bra alternativ.

challenges_english: The weight, the dark frame and the lenses were a bit too dark compared to not wearing them. Also, there were many glances and concern from people around me.
act_impact_english: During intense work and on public transport.
beh_adapt_english: Explained the circumstances in all interactions, sometimes quickly took them off or put them on my forehead to divert attention.
social_english: All the time at the workplace, but only positive curious reactions.
improvements_english: Headband or hat instead of glasses. More comfortable to wear and possibly more socially acceptable since it could be mistaken for a headlamp instead of a camera.
challenges: Tyngden, mörka ramen och glaset var en aning mörkt jämfört med att vara utan dess. Samt mycket blickar och oro från omgivningen
act_impact: Under intensivt arbete och på kollektivtrafiken
beh_adapt: Förklarade omständigheterna för alla interaktioner, tog ibland snabbt av dem eller satte på pannan för att styra undan uppmärksamhet
social: Hela tiden på arbetsplatsen, men bara glada nyfikna reaktioner
improvements: Pannband eller mössa i stället för glasögon. Bekvämare att ha på sig och möjligen mer socialt acceptabelt då det kan misstas som pannlampa i stället för kamera

general_feeling_english: OK, a little bothersome outdoors and with long-sleeved clothes.
challenges_english: Long-sleeved shirts, you need to pay attention. It doesn't work with shirts.
improvements_english: Wearing glasses is not acceptable. The necklace is completely OK.
